title: New Arcane
description: This mod is inspired by the animated series "Arcane"
body:
This mod is inspired by the animated series "Arcane" and therefore the game "League of Legends"

The mod is in Alpha and is in 1.20.1

This mod doesn't add much at the moment
It only adds two items(Hextech gems and Hextech stable gems), a structure(Hextech Tower) and and a block(Hextech Workbench)

the hextech workbench is probably the cheapest craft in this mod
![Craft etabli Hextech](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/272abbb99318e7c77278379f53499f14965ff4a4.png)

To actually start this mod you will need to kill 3 Withers to craft a Flawless Hextech Gem.(has no use yet)
![gemme hextech stable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/698c6b68fe100fc5c83a91ffa86e0b2c730cf07f.png)

Before crafting a stable Hextech gem you will need a Hextech gem, but be careful because if you throw it it will explode.

![Hextech craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3816fbc6fc5c6318aba846023ef5355503adc95.png)


### !WARNING!
### 
Do not put more than one item in a slot of the Hextech Workbench
            
            THIS MOD IS NOT MY PRIORITY, MY PRIORITY IS THE "Wakfu" MOD.
